Raw SQL bypasses softDeleteExtension — queries manually filter deletedAt IS NULL + join WorkspaceMember. Search is user-scoped (all member workspaces), optional workspaceId filter. No offset pagination (palettes show top-N; ponytail: offset deferred). Schema hygiene checklist respected: no board-in-names, no new structural fields on Task. Fixes during testing: (1) CROSS JOIN LATERAL instead of comma+JOIN mix (explicit JOIN binds to last comma FROM-item); (2) regexp_replace on all 3 tsvector expressions (default tokenizer kept 'invoice-2026.xlsx' as one lexeme); (3) test DB migrate reset instead of db push (db push can't express GENERATED columns). Docker API container smoke blocked by registry.npmjs.org network errors (EAI_AGAIN/CONNECT_TIMEOUT) during pnpm install attestations — environmental, not code; host-side tsx smoke used instead.
